app.name: FlashLearn
app.tagline: Master any subject through gamified learning

hero.title: FlashLearn
hero.subtitle: Master any subject through gamified flashcards, timed exams, and exciting pet battles. Study smart, level up, and become a learning champion!

flashcards.title: Interactive Flashcards
flashcards.description: Flip cards to reveal answers. Rate your recall and track your progress with our spaced repetition system.

exams.title: Timed Exams
exams.description: Test your knowledge with timed quizzes. Choose between type-in or multiple choice answers.

xp.title: XP & Leveling
xp.description: Earn experience points for every study session and exam. Watch your level grow as you learn!

challenges.title: Daily Challenges
challenges.description: Complete daily challenges to earn bonus XP and maintain your learning streak.

pets.title: Pet Companions
pets.description: Adopt a pet cat, feed it, and watch it evolve. Your pet grows stronger with your progress!

battles.title: Battle Arena
battles.description: Use your knowledge to power up attacks. Answer correctly to deal critical damage to opponents!

step1.title: Create or Choose a Deck
step1.description: Start with pre-built decks for HSK Chinese, TOEIC English, or create your own custom deck.

step2.title: Study & Take Exams
step2.description: Review flashcards, take timed exams, and earn XP, food, and badges as you progress.

step3.title: Feed & Battle
step3.description: Use food to level up your pet. Battle opponents and show off your knowledge!

petShowcase.title: Meet Your Pet Companion
petShowcase.subtitle: Adopt, feed, and evolve your very own cat!

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners mastering new subjects every day.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Login to continue your learning journey

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

pet.title: My Pet
pet.subtitle: Care for your pet and make it stronger
pet.noPetDescription: Complete exams and study sessions to earn food and adopt your very own cat companion
pet.levelUp: Level up to earn more points!

inquiry.title: Send Inquiry
inquiry.subject: Subject
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or suggestion in detail...
inquiry.error: Failed to send inquiry. Please try again.
